closingNote: Closed slow — we led objectives but the game ran 36 minutes. Convert Fangtooth/tower leads into ending the game, don't farm the lead and risk a throw.
draftNote: 1 of five queued off a bottom-two lane: Mr_Meat31 (support→offlane).

coaching.headline: Lost the tower trade 7–10 and won anyway — a 28/1 Drongo won 8 fights, and 6 of those wins cashed into a prize within 90 seconds, majors finishing 25–21.
coaching.team: This win came from the fights, not the structures: we went 8 won to 1 lost across the game's fights and cashed 6 of the 8 into a prize within 90 seconds, finishing 25–21 on majors. Now the honest part of the tower story: they out-towered us 10–7, but not off their fighting — they won exactly one fight all game. Their structure takes rode on our deaths — the death-cost log ties their outer towers, inner towers and inhibitors to deaths at 14.6, 17.1, 20.2, 27.1, 27.8 and 30 — and 7 of our deaths came outside any fight, caught rotating alone. Repeat the pattern that won it: fight on top of the prize and cash the win. The one sharpen: stop trading solo deaths for their structures — the two uncashed fight wins and the 7 caught-out deaths are the whole gap between a 36-minute grind and a clean close.
coaching.whatShiftedIt: Fight wins were converted and deaths were not free: 6 of our 8 won fights cashed into a prize within 90 seconds, while their tower lead rode on our deaths — the death-cost log ties their outer towers, inner towers and inhibitors to our deaths, 7 of them caught-out, outside any fight. Cut the caught-out deaths and the tower count flips with everything else.

perPlayer.10edbf65-457d-48d0-9151-9df5b4fcb40a: Drongo carry, 28/1/2 — Willy Guggenheim was the win condition: 2-0 at their outer tower at 18.6, 3-0 at their inhibitor at 20.6 and again at 28.6 (that one modeled at 3 items online to their side's 11), 2-0 at our Orb Prime at 33.1, on top of 37,403 objective damage and 11.3 CS/min against the 6.5 norm. The only death, at 12.6, was outside any fight — the exact habit that fed their towers when others did it. Keep everything else.
perPlayer.7c8ab99c-31c5-4ea5-a6fa-e0d6417c3f1b: Phase support, 2/0/26 — zero deaths against Mr_Meat31's 2-a-game norm in a support matchup that read theirs all game (Muriel), with 13 wards to the 9 norm, 29,241 healing and 581 damage mitigated a minute against the 351 norm. That's the enabling behind a 28/1 carry — repeat it. One read from the fight log: the wins at 20.6 and 28.6 were opened 4v5 while Mr_Meat31 was pinned in a losing lane — when stuck like that, call it early so the team times its fights around the arrival instead of a body down.
perPlayer.a412baf3-dd17-4f89-8ecf-9d0704f3a79e: Aurora jungle, 2/2/10 — Xeebs was the frontline: 54,576 damage taken, 46,256 mitigated, 7 wards to the 4 norm, in a jungle matchup that read Xeebs' way all game against Khaimera. The sharpen is that both deaths were the expensive kind: the 17.1 death preceded their outer tower, and the 20.2 catch preceded an inner tower, an inhibitor and a second inner tower inside 90 seconds. And at the 30.6 teamfight Xeebs was alive and ahead in lane — shove and rotate there turns the 4v5 the team opened into even numbers.

threats: Chain-CC risk (1 hard-CC abilities, ~0.5s of lockdown): Lt. Belica Neural Disruptor (silence 0.5s). Don't group tight into it — stagger the engage and hold mobility/cleanse for the key one.
synergy: Our engage/CC: Iggy & Scorch Inferno (knockback). Our kills come from landing burst INSIDE that CC window — whoever lands it, the rest must follow up immediately.
We have sustain (Phase) — favor the longer fight where our heals out-grind them.
Our damage is 4/5 magical — predictable; one magic-resist item answers most of it. Mix in a physical threat.
Strong AoE/teamfight kit — group at choke points and fight on top of objectives.

ourKits.combo: Telekinetic Link an ally → Psychic Flare blind → Energy Lance → Hyperflux buff ult
ourKits.winCondition: buff a hyper-carry through the Link and Hyperflux for a teamfight
ourKits.passive: abilities heal her and her linked ally
ourKits.playWith: the strongest carry to Link and supercharge
ourKits.playAgainst: kill the linked carry, not Phase; break the link timing

ourKits.combo: Oil Spill → Molotov ignite → Flame Turret → Inferno knockback ult
ourKits.winCondition: layer fire zones on a choke/objective and burn the team
ourKits.playWith: CC that holds enemies in his fire
ourKits.playAgainst: don't fight in his zones — flank; kill the turret, dive him

ourKits.combo: Old Rusty slow → Gag Grenade silence → Rad Rounds basics → Shrapnel Cannon armor shred
ourKits.winCondition: kite back, stack Wastelander bleed and Rad Rounds, melt from range
ourKits.playWith: peel and frontline so he can free-fire
ourKits.playAgainst: low mobility — dive him or break LoS through his poke; he folds to hard engage

ourKits.combo: Boreal Sweep slow → Hoarfrost root → Glacial Charge engage → Cryoseism stun ult
ourKits.winCondition: chain frost CC (slow→root→stun) to lock the fight down
ourKits.playWith: burst that converts her long CC chain into kills
ourKits.playAgainst: she's a CC battery — cleanse/QSS the Cryoseism stun; spread to avoid the chain

enemyKits.combo: Assault The Gates leap → Make Way armor shred → Sacred Oath empowered basic → Stone Forged Soul stasis ult
enemyKits.winCondition: front-line aggressively and reset the fight with the stasis heal
enemyKits.playWith: a team that fights while he soaks and stasis-resets
enemyKits.playAgainst: don't waste burst into his stasis — wait it out; anti-heal cuts the ult heal

enemyKits.combo: Seismic Assault knockup → Void Bomb → Neural Disruptor silence ult, Void Drone mana drain
enemyKits.winCondition: knock up + silence a target and burst with missing-HP scaling
enemyKits.playAgainst: dodge Seismic Assault; she's immobile — dive when ult is down

enemyKits.combo: Alacrity shield+AS → Consecrated Ground bubble → Reversal global save
enemyKits.winCondition: keep the carry alive with global shields and enable their damage
enemyKits.passive: abilities grant Sentinel to allies; on-hit bonus
enemyKits.playAgainst: she has no damage threat — dive her carry through the shields or pick her first

enemyKits.combo: Ambush leap → Unleash AS → Cull stun, Invigorate to cleanse+heal
enemyKits.winCondition: stick on one target, stun with Cull and out-sustain via Spirit Regen
enemyKits.playWith: follow-up burst inside his Cull stun
enemyKits.playAgainst: ANTI-HEAL is mandatory — it guts his whole kit; kite the leap and CC through Invigorate

enemyKits.combo: Plasma Grenade → Hypercharge on-hit → Air Assault reposition → Atomiser ult
enemyKits.winCondition: Hypercharge and kite-shoot from Air Assault safety
enemyKits.passive: extra jump; kills cause corpse explosions
enemyKits.playWith: a frontline so she can free-fire airborne
enemyKits.playAgainst: CC her out of Air Assault; she's squishy on the ground

itemTimelineNote: estMin = first minute the role's measured median gold curve covers the cumulative inventory cost (slot order ≈ purchase order) — THEORY, no purchase timestamps in either API

fights.note: caught-out = deaths outside every clustered fight; costs/conversion use a 90s window over the per-event objective+tower stream; itemGap counts participants' items est. online (median-gold model, THEORY)
